sentences.arabic: يَلْتَقِي زَعِيمَا الْبَلَدَيْنِ فِي قِمَّةٍ ثُنَائِيَّةٍ لِبَحْثِ الْعَلَاقَاتِ الدِّبْلُومَاسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Lideri dviju zemalja se susreću na bilateralnom samitu radi razmatranja diplomatskih odnosa.
sentences.translationEn: The leaders of the two countries meet at a bilateral summit to discuss diplomatic relations.
